title: CSIR IGIB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Technician Posts
description: CSIR Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology (CSIR IGIB) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 15 Technician Jobs. Candidates who have qualified for any degree can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR IGIB Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date for applications. ...
